_comment: Per-route First Load JS budgets in KB (gzip), enforced by scripts/check-bundle-budget.mjs in CI (pnpm budget). Numbers match `next build`'s reported First Load JS. Budgets are ~15 kB (~7%) above the 2026-07-15 baseline: headroom for normal iteration, tight enough to catch a real regression. Raising a budget must happen in the same PR as the growth so the increase is reviewed. Recalibrate downward as Vercel Speed Insights shows real-user headroom. Full rationale: software-craft vault handoff 2026-07-15-sihha-perf-gate-and-test-audit.md.
